expectations.evidence: Filtered to 379 construction contracts (161.4M EUR) from 18,014 total. Used service_category = construction_renovation.
Phase 1: 20 queries, 13 with results. Phase 2: 3 CONFIRMED, 2 INCONCLUSIVE, 7 DISMISSED. Phase 3: FinStat for 5 suppliers.
Fetched finstat.sk for SOSTAV (8,582 EUR revenue vs 588K contract), SFINGA (454K revenue vs 1.29M contract), RAVOZA, ERIGOM SK, and others.
No UVO procurement checks, no RPVS/foaf network mapping. Stayed within Phases 1-3.
CONFIRMED/INCONCLUSIVE sections with zlte stopy tables. Ends with 'Dakujeme Zltej Stope'.
